allow: Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);$p->exec\('\\''CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS korsafety CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci'\\''\);echo '\\''DB created'\\'';')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);echo $p->query\('\\''select id from products where main_image is not null limit 1'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\);')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);$r=$p->query\('\\''select id,external_no,main_image from products where id=1'\\''\)->fetch\(\);print_r\($r\);')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);foreach\($p->query\('\\''select c.name,c.slug,count\(pr.id\) n from categories c left join products pr on pr.category_id=c.id group by c.id order by c.sort'\\''\)->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\) as $r\){echo $r['\\''n'\\'']."\\t".$r['\\''slug'\\'']."\\t".$r['\\''name'\\'']."\\n";}')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);foreach\($p->query\('\\''select c.name,count\(pc.product_id\) n from categories c left join product_category pc on pc.category_id=c.id group by c.id order by c.sort'\\''\)->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\) as $r\){echo $r['\\''n'\\'']."\\t".$r['\\''name'\\'']."\\n";}')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);$r=$p->query\('\\''select id,external_no,name,category_id,main_image from products where id=500'\\''\)->fetch\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\);print_r\($r\);echo '\\''images: '\\''.$p->query\('\\''select count\(*\) from product_images where product_id=500'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\)."\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);echo '\\''상품: '\\''.$p->query\('\\''select count\(*\) from products'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\).'\\'' / 카테고리: '\\''.$p->query\('\\''select count\(*\) from categories'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\).'\\'' / 이미지: '\\''.$p->query\('\\''select count\(*\) from product_images'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\).'\\'' / 카테고리연결: '\\''.$p->query\('\\''select count\(*\) from product_category'\\''\)->fetchColumn\(\).PHP_EOL;')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);foreach\($p->query\("select pr.id,pr.name,count\(pi.id\) c from products pr join product_images pi on pi.product_id=pr.id and pi.type='\\''detail'\\'' group by pr.id order by c desc limit 5"\) as $r\){echo $r['\\''c'\\''].'\\'' imgs | id='\\''.$r['\\''id'\\''].'\\'' | '\\''.mb_substr\($r['\\''name'\\''],0,30\)."\\n";}')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);foreach\($p->query\("select path from product_images where product_id=2519 and type='\\''detail'\\'' limit 4"\) as $r\){echo $r['\\''path'\\''].'\\'' '\\''; $f='\\''public'\\''.$r['\\''path'\\'']; echo \(file_exists\($f\)?filesize\($f\):0\)." bytes\\n";}')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);foreach\($p->query\("select brand,count\(*\) c from products where brand like '\\''%예스윌%'\\'' or brand like '\\''%YESWILL%'\\'' or brand like '\\''%yeswill%'\\'' group by brand order by c desc"\) as $r\){echo $r['\\''c'\\'']."\\t[".$r['\\''brand'\\'']."]\\n";}')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\('\\''mysql:host=127.0.0.1;dbname=korsafety'\\'','\\''root'\\'','\\'''\\''\);echo '\\''name포함: '\\''.$p->query\("select count\(*\) from products where name like '\\''%예스윌%'\\'' or name like '\\''%YESWILL%'\\''"\)->fetchColumn\(\).PHP_EOL;')
